depends_on.name: syncrule_id_#
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of a synchronisation rule participating in this sync graph. Each instance is named 'syncrule_id_1', 'syncrule_id_2', etc. A sync graph may reference any number of sync rules.

fields.name: ndi_syncgraph_class
fields.documentation: The class name of the synchronisation graph implementation.
